query:
INSERT INTO product_categories (name, slug, description, icon) VALUES ('Deli', 'deli', 'Fresh deli items - rolls, sandwiches, wraps', '🥖');

INSERT INTO products (store_id, category_id, name, description, price, is_available) VALUES
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'Chicken Fillet Roll', 'Fresh chicken fillet in a deli roll with your choice of fillings', 5.50, 1),
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'Breakfast Roll', 'Sausage, bacon, egg, pudding in a fresh roll', 5.00, 1),
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'Spicy Chicken Wrap', 'Spicy chicken with lettuce, cheese and sauce in a tortilla wrap', 5.50, 1),
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'BLT Sandwich', 'Bacon, lettuce and tomato on fresh bread', 4.50, 1),
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'Ham & Cheese Toastie', 'Toasted ham and cheese sandwich', 4.00, 1),
(1, (SELECT id FROM product_categories WHERE slug = 'deli'), 'Sausage Roll', 'Hot sausage roll from the deli counter', 2.50, 1);
